boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closure matches batch, assay, criterion, and release date before shipment.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-XOR-078 confirms deviation closure matches all parameters for batch X-78.

final_answer: The clinical batch may be released. Source records, specifically CLOSE-XOR-078, confirm that the deviation closure precisely matches the batch (X-78), assay (AX-22), criterion (Cq<=31), and release date (2026-06-28) as required by policy STD-XOR-078-P. The visible deviation alert is resolved by this exact closure, and the release date precedes shipment, thus satisfying the source-boundary requirements.
